TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cambodia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 105 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 181,035 sq km (maki' tay 90ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 176,515 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 4,520 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 15,957,223. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 32.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 56.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 11.40% Cambodia柬埔寨 zik nqu ziray 東漢 lga rima maki qu Cambodia bnrwan naha biru maki s Cyokok ."後漢書"sun nanah maha究不事,"隋書"sun naha ma真臘,"唐書"sun naha ma吉蔑,閣蔑(wiway Khmer pin tnaq nqu hngyang),maki squ 元朝sun naha maha甘勃智,"明史"sun naha ma武者,babaw nqu 明朝萬曆,s'agal naha squ hngiyang maha "kwara smllwan naha qani ga 皆為Kambuja qu pintnaq hngyang. anan ga maki te kyopan wagi bnrwan naha squ sraral ga , maki squ kawas te 1524 qsu ba lay lalu nqu Cambodia min htuw sa bnrwan na biru kahul squ 義大利安東尼奧·皮加費塔 lalu "Camogia"naqni qu pinlawa naha squ lalu na Kokka qani. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Phnom Penh. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Norodom Sihamoni, aring ryax 14 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zyuwa na sraral maki squ kung yal 1 Sici, zik nqu Camogia nyux ki'anKokka 扶南,smnhi squ 印度qani qu nyux naha galan smnhyan na kokka,nyux zzik qu sinqbangan gaga na 印度.Kokka nqu 扶南wiway yaqu qalang 毗耶陀補羅(Vyadhapura,梵文:燒批qalang nqu pqalup),misuw soni naga bih nqu qalang波羅勉, maki qu llyung nqu湄公te kyopan wagi mkura tltun mqluwi zik na bsilung squ ht'gan wagi.maki squ ziray na秦,漢, 扶南ki Cyokok ga maki qu pinkyalan naha nanak zyuwaw nqu tbziran. Kung ywan七Seci中葉,Kokka扶南hya ga wayal qolan ni mkura tltu 真臘,laqi nqu 扶南qani ga musa mtkari squ 爪哇,psrux squ山帝王朝. babaw na nwaha qmol nqu真臘Kokka na扶南lga,krahu ru lokah qu Kokkanya la；te huk闍耶跋摩klhangan nqu qutux na Seci,wal nya slqux rhyal kska ki mkura tltu Kokka寮,Kokka na國境mkura tltumubuy squ 南詔,rroq maki squ mkura kiluxv kyahu lliyung na湄公,ana yaqu misu nqu Kokka Cambodia qani uzi,Kokka寮ru mkura kilux 越南qani.Ungat qu kilbahan na闍耶跋摩qutux Seci,babaw nqu 卒lga laqiq na metswae nya kneril 闍耶提黛維qu syunaw cintman nya la,taqu Kokkaqani lgakmal maha wayal mkbka lma,sun naha maha史hyaga teqsya ru rrhyal qu真臘hya,nyux memaw mubu nanak. babaw nqu Kung yan787kawas,teqsya真臘qalang rhyal nqu wagi桑比補羅qani wahan kmyat ptyaqih na pequliq squ bslung na爪哇,mrhuw nqu Kokka na摩希婆提跋摩qani ga wayal kutan,laqiq nqu mrhuw (babaw nya lga闍耶跋摩te sazing Seci)wayal kyapun la.ubuy qsya nqu真臘aring kyalga爪哇m' 王朝nqu 夏連特拉la squnun mlahang kwara,muzing squ te sazing Seci nqu 闍耶跋摩kahul squ爪哇msbzinah mgay,m'thoki nanak.Taqu te sazing Seci nqu 闍耶跋摩wal nya sqtuxun squ qsya ki rrhyan nqu真臘,maki squ spzyang qalang na Kokka' 吳哥ht'gan wagi mkura tltu kya wal squ30kung ri ryax nqu荔枝,nyux psrux squ 吳哥王朝. 吳哥王朝,mutux naha smllwan maha Kokka高棉,mucing squ 12 Seci krahu naqu qpzing ,m'smyax qu gaga naha,hitgan nqu zka ru ana yaqu gin soni nqu kwara rhyan Cambodia ki 泰,寮,越rhyal nqu cyugan Kokka qani.13Seci,上座部佛教ga yaqu 斯里蘭卡qu mwah smatu.明宣德五kawas(1430kawas)kywpan nqu 暹羅qu Cambodia,qbyangun naha qalang 吳哥七byacing,pucing nya lga wayal naha kyopan qu吳哥.yalaw gi 吳哥ki 暹羅ga mksobih balay,nanu ya sa qu wal naha si laxi qu 吳哥,mshriq squ qalang te bih na king. babaw nya lga ,mhhwi ru walya slaqux qu Kokka na Cambodia,nyux mnaga Kokka na越南,qqolan naqu sazing Kokka na暹羅 ,maki squ zyuwaw na kinraral ga sun naha ma ziray nqu mnkun na Cambodia.te kyahu nqu Cambodia (maki squ lliyng湄公三角洲)mnaki squ ziray qani ga minqolan nqu越南,'mubuy squ bsyaq nqu kawas pinsqihan naha squ Kokka柬ki越. rhyal rhyan nyux ki'an na Cambodia ga maki squ kska na rhyal mkura kilux tekyopan wagi mkura kilux,kwara rhyan nya qani ga181,035ping bang kong ri, rhyal nqu pqmahan hya ga 20%,maki squ Kwara ka Kokka nqu te mkura kilux tehok tekyopan wagi qu rhyan ki'an naha,te mkura tltu hya ga rgyax nqu 扁擔 ki qes nqu 泰國柯叻,te rhyan nqu ht'gan wagi hya ga rhyan na臘塔納基里台ki Chhlong wagi rhyan ru 越南中央wagi rhyan ga mksopih.mkra tekyopan wagi hya ga rgzil ru b'nux kitan bsilung:mkkita squ暹邏wan bsilung na施亞努.ryax nq 扁擔makia squ rhyan nqu te mkura tltu,yaqu Kokka na泰rhyan na柯叻te mkura kilux myunaw ru mrsnat kwara,qani ga qes na Kokka泰ki Kokka na Cambodia. Pspngun qu lingay na Kokka ga,ini pyang karahu qu Kokka na Cambodia hya,kwara qu Kokka qani ga nyux qsugun squ 24 qalang(zik qani ga spayat qu mksobih sa bslung),atu cyugal hya ga 另klhangan naha nanak qu qalang naha,maki172 qu qalang,1547 rhyal.kil qruyux nqu kitan na bsilung Kokka hya ga 435 kung ri ,maki na qu ini ggwahi nqu rhyanl紅樹林. Spyang 'llwawktan nau kktan rhyal na Kokka Cambodia ga,cyux maki te ksak nqu rhyal Kokka lanuw洞里薩,llyung 巴薩kiwayal myut kwara squ Kokka mkura kilux mkura tltu nqu llyung 湄公.Kska nqu be'nux rhyal Kokka rhyal ga 3/4 kwara,ru ht'gan wagi mkura kilux ki te kyopan wagi nqu 象山,荳蔻山；musa te Kokka na泰國柯叻台rhyal rgyax qes na扁擔山；ru rhyal nqu ht'gan wagi越南 kska nqu wagi qes nqu cyux ki'an na Chhlong pspngun qu kilwagiq nyaga wa yaqu k'twan nqu qqhoniq,cikuy balay qu squliq nyux naha ki'an qani. 洞里薩湖─湄公 nyux ki'an rhyal qani ga rroq kinwagiq nya ga 100 kung c' nqu b'nux,maha mkrayas lga,mutux ini pyunaw qu rhyal nya la.tekyopan wagi mkura kilux rgyax nqu荳蔻 kinwagiq nya ga wal hminas squ 1500 kung c'taqu kinwagiq na tekyopan wagi mkura kilux,pwah squ tekyopan wagi mkura tltu tehuk squ ht'gan wagi mkura kilux.rgyax nqu奧拉爾山(Phnom Aural)hya ga spyang kinwagiq rgyx Kokka na Cambodia,cyux maki sa rhyal na ht'gan wagi,kinwagiq nya ga 1771kung c'. minkahul squ rgyax na荳蔻nqu rgyax象,mkura squ mkura kilux ru ht'gan wagi temkura killux,kinwagiq nya ga waya squ l500~1000 kung c'.sazing rhyal qani ga wiway mt 500~700 kung c'.yuwaw nqu rhyal na mkura tltu rgyax nqu 荳蔻ki rhyal nqu tekyopan wagi rgyax nqu 扁擔qani ga,llyung hgcyan na洞里薩,kglabang nya te huk squ Kokka be'nux na 泰,ga ggwahan tuqiy na曼谷. taqu spyang qryux na llyung Kokka na Cambodia湄公 ga,nyux nya saras squ cingyay na qsya qu Kokka qani.llyung na湄公kahul squ Cyokokk qu puqing nya,ru mqluwi緬甸,寮國,babaw nqu Kokka na 泰國,lga mwah myup squ Kokka na Cambodia.maki squ bih na king,rhyal nqu mkura kilux llyung Bassak,ru tehuk uzi squ tekyopan wagi mkura tltu mubuy squ langu na 洞里薩,si usa mekura squ rhyan na ht'gan wagi mkura kilux,aring squ 越南musa myup squ ksak na mkura kilux nqu bslung na Cyukok. Pinsrngyan na Kokka Spyang krahu rnaw Cyukok squ Kokka na Cambodia hya,ru msqun gmluw kbalay squ ssyan gwahan na qasu nqu 施亞努.Mrhuw nqu Cambodia 洪森mkura squ tetanux nqu mmosa naha ppcywagun,nanu yasa qu kinta nqu kahal tekyopan wagi qu Cambodia qani ga wiwal nqu sinqunan ru rngu na lingay Cyukok ma.makia squ spzyang qalang na Kokka',ana makai inu ga baqun mita kwara qu cingay nqu Tteluw nyux mtyuwaw nqu sseplyan. yalaw gi qpzing nqu Biw na 柏威夏ki zyuwaw na kinraral qani ga nyux mstiyan mzzyuwaw,ru Kokka na泰國qani ga nyux ini psblaq minpira naha mscikuy mtciriq.mrhuw nqu Cambodia 洪森minmsblaq ini ptalax ki qsu mrhuw na Kokka na 泰,minnaki squ 2009 kawas tehok squ 2010 kawas ga 'nagan naha mwah rmwaw zyuwaw spyang ppqutan nqu ggalan ppila. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% ʦ~ʨamβo*ia*** zik nqu ziraj ** lɣa rima maki qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia βnrwan naħa βiru maki s~ɕ ʦ~ʨjokok ."***"s~ɕun nanaħ maħa***,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,**(wiwaj kħmer pin tnaq nqu ħŋjaŋ),maki s~ɕqu **s~ɕun naħa maħa***,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,βaβaw nqu ****,s~ɕʔaɣal naħa s~ɕqu ħŋijaŋ maħa "kwara s~ɕmllwan naħa qani ɣa **kamβuja qu pintnaq ħŋjaŋ. anan ɣa maki te kjopan waɣi βnrwan naħa s~ɕqu s~ɕraral ɣa , maki s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ te **** qs~ɕu βa laj lalu nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia min ħtuw s~ɕa βnrwan na βiru kaħul s~ɕqu ************ lalu "ʦ~ʨamoɣia"naqni qu pinlawa naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kokka qani. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pħnom penħ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa noro*om s~ɕiħamoni, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. zjuwa na s~ɕraral maki s~ɕqu kuŋ jal * s~ɕiʦ~ʨi, zik nqu ʦ~ʨamoɣia njux kiʔankokka **,s~ɕmnħi s~ɕqu **qani qu njux naħa ɣalan s~ɕmnħjan na kokka,njux zzik qu s~ɕinqβaŋan ɣaɣa na **.kokka nqu **wiwaj jaqu qalaŋ *****(*ja*ħapura,**:**qalaŋ nqu pqalup),mis~ɕuw s~ɕoni naɣa βiħ nqu qalaŋ***, maki qu lljuŋ nqu**te kjopan waɣi mkura tltun mqluwi zik na βs~ɕiluŋ s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi.maki s~ɕqu ziraj na*,*, **ki ʦ~ʨjokok ɣa maki qu pinkjalan naħa nanak zjuwaw nqu tβziran. kuŋ jwan*s~ɕeʦ~ʨi**,kokka**ħja ɣa wajal qolan ni mkura tltu **,laqi nqu **qani ɣa mus~ɕa mtkari s~ɕqu **,ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu****. βaβaw na nwaħa qmol nqu**kokka na**lɣa,kraħu ru lokaħ qu kokkanja la*te ħuk****klħaŋan nqu qutux na s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,wal nja s~ɕlqux rħjal ks~ɕka ki mkura tltu kokka*,kokka na**mkura tltumuβuj s~ɕqu **,rroq maki s~ɕqu mkura kilux* kjaħu llijuŋ na**,ana jaqu mis~ɕu nqu kokka ʦ~ʨamβo*ia qani uzi,kokka*ru mkura kilux **qani.uŋat qu kilβaħan na****qutux s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,βaβaw nqu *lɣa laqiq na mets~ɕwae nja kneril *****qu s~ɕjunaw ʦ~ʨintman nja la,taqu kokkaqani lɣakmal maħa wajal mkβka lma,s~ɕun naħa maħa*ħjaɣa teqs~ɕja ru rrħjal qu**ħja,njux memaw muβu nanak. βaβaw nqu kuŋ jan***kawas~ɕ,teqs~ɕja**qalaŋ rħjal nqu waɣi****qani waħan kmjat ptjaqiħ na pequliq s~ɕqu βs~ɕluŋ na**,mrħuw nqu kokka na******qani ɣa wajal kutan,laqiq nqu mrħuw (βaβaw nja lɣa****te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi)wajal kjapun la.uβuj qs~ɕja nqu**ariŋ kjalɣa**mʔ **nqu ****la s~ɕqunun mlaħaŋ kwara,muziŋ s~ɕqu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi nqu ****kaħul s~ɕqu**ms~ɕβzinaħ mɣaj,mʔtħoki nanak.taqu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi nqu ****wal nja s~ɕqtuxun s~ɕqu qs~ɕja ki rrħjan nqu**,maki s~ɕqu s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ **ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura tltu kja wal s~ɕqu**kuŋ ri rjax nqu**,njux ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu ****. ****,mutux naħa s~ɕmllwan maħa kokka**,muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕqu ** s~ɕeʦ~ʨi kraħu naqu qpziŋ ,mʔs~ɕmjax qu ɣaɣa naħa,ħitɣan nqu zka ru ana jaqu ɣin s~ɕoni nqu kwara rħjan ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ki *,*,*rħjal nqu ʦ~ʨjuɣan kokka qani.**s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,*****ɣa jaqu ****qu mwaħ s~ɕmatu.****kawas~ɕ(****kawas~ɕ)kjwpan nqu **qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,qβjaŋun naħa qalaŋ ***βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,puʦ~ʨiŋ nja lɣa wajal naħa kjopan qu**.jalaw ɣi **ki **ɣa mks~ɕoβiħ βalaj,nanu ja s~ɕa qu wal naħa s~ɕi laxi qu **,ms~ɕħriq s~ɕqu qalaŋ te βiħ na kiŋ. βaβaw nja lɣa ,mħħwi ru walja s~ɕlaqux qu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,njux mnaɣa kokka na**,qqolan naqu s~ɕaziŋ kokka na** ,maki s~ɕqu zjuwaw na kinraral ɣa s~ɕun naħa ma ziraj nqu mnkun na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia.te kjaħu nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia (maki s~ɕqu llijŋ*****)mnaki s~ɕqu ziraj qani ɣa minqolan nqu**,ʔmuβuj s~ɕqu βs~ɕjaq nqu kawas~ɕ pins~ɕqiħan naħa s~ɕqu kokka*ki*. rħjal rħjan njux kiʔan na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ɣa maki s~ɕqu ks~ɕka na rħjal mkura kilux tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux,kwara rħjan nja qani ɣa***,***piŋ βaŋ koŋ ri, rħjal nqu pqmaħan ħja ɣa **%,maki s~ɕqu kwara ka kokka nqu te mkura kilux teħok tekjopan waɣi qu rħjan kiʔan naħa,te mkura tltu ħja ɣa rɣjax nqu ** ki qes~ɕ nqu ****,te rħjan nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi ħja ɣa rħjan na******ki ʦ~ʨħħloŋ waɣi rħjan ru ****waɣi rħjan ɣa mks~ɕopiħ.mkra tekjopan waɣi ħja ɣa rɣzil ru βʔnux kitan βs~ɕiluŋ:mkkita s~ɕqu**wan βs~ɕiluŋ na***.rjax nq **makia s~ɕqu rħjan nqu te mkura tltu,jaqu kokka na*rħjan na**te mkura kilux mjunaw ru mrs~ɕnat kwara,qani ɣa qes~ɕ na kokka*ki kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia. ps~ɕpŋun qu liŋaj na kokka ɣa,ini pjaŋ karaħu qu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħja,kwara qu kokka qani ɣa njux qs~ɕuɣun s~ɕqu ** qalaŋ(zik qani ɣa s~ɕpajat qu mks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕa βs~ɕluŋ),atu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħja ɣa *klħaŋan naħa nanak qu qalaŋ naħa,maki*** qu qalaŋ,**** rħjal.kil qrujux nqu kitan na βs~ɕiluŋ kokka ħja ɣa *** kuŋ ri ,maki na qu ini ɣɣwaħi nqu rħjanl***. s~ɕpjaŋ ʔllwawktan nau kktan rħjal na kokka ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux maki te ks~ɕak nqu rħjal kokka lanuw***,lljuŋ **kiwajal mjut kwara s~ɕqu kokka mkura kilux mkura tltu nqu lljuŋ **.ks~ɕka nqu βeʔnux rħjal kokka rħjal ɣa */* kwara,ru ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux ki te kjopan waɣi nqu **,****mus~ɕa te kokka na*****rħjal rɣjax qes~ɕ na****ru rħjal nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi** ks~ɕka nqu waɣi qes~ɕ nqu ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan na ʦ~ʨħħloŋ ps~ɕpŋun qu kilwaɣiq njaɣa wa jaqu kʔtwan nqu qqħoniq,ʦ~ʨikuj βalaj qu s~ɕquliq njux naħa kiʔan qani. ******* njux kiʔan rħjal qani ɣa rroq kinwaɣiq nja ɣa *** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ nqu βʔnux,maħa mkrajas~ɕ lɣa,mutux ini pjunaw qu rħjal nja la.tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux rɣjax nqu** kinwaɣiq nja ɣa wal ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu **** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔtaqu kinwaɣiq na tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux,pwaħ s~ɕqu tekjopan waɣi mkura tltu teħuk s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux.rɣjax nqu****(pħnom aural)ħja ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kinwaɣiq rɣjx kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa rħjal na ħtʔɣan waɣi,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa ****kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ. minkaħul s~ɕqu rɣjax na**nqu rɣjax*,mkura s~ɕqu mkura kilux ru ħtʔɣan waɣi temkura killux,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa waja s~ɕqu l***~**** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ.s~ɕaziŋ rħjal qani ɣa wiwaj mt ***~*** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ.juwaw nqu rħjal na mkura tltu rɣjax nqu **ki rħjal nqu tekjopan waɣi rɣjax nqu **qani ɣa,lljuŋ ħɣʦ~ʨjan na***,kɣlaβaŋ nja te ħuk s~ɕqu kokka βeʔnux na *,ɣa ɣɣwaħan tuqij na**. taqu s~ɕpjaŋ qrjux na lljuŋ kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia** ɣa,njux nja s~ɕaras~ɕ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨiŋjaj na qs~ɕja qu kokka qani.lljuŋ na**kaħul s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨjokokk qu puqiŋ nja,ru mqluwi**,**,βaβaw nqu kokka na **,lɣa mwaħ mjup s~ɕqu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia.maki s~ɕqu βiħ na kiŋ,rħjal nqu mkura kilux lljuŋ βas~ɕs~ɕak,ru teħuk uzi s~ɕqu tekjopan waɣi mkura tltu muβuj s~ɕqu laŋu na ***,s~ɕi us~ɕa mekura s~ɕqu rħjan na ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux,ariŋ s~ɕqu **mus~ɕa mjup s~ɕqu ks~ɕak na mkura kilux nqu βs~ɕluŋ na ʦ~ʨjukok. pins~ɕrŋjan na kokka s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu rnaw ʦ~ʨjukok s~ɕqu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħja,ru ms~ɕqun ɣmluw kβalaj s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕjan ɣwaħan na qas~ɕu nqu ***.mrħuw nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia **mkura s~ɕqu tetanux nqu mmos~ɕa naħa ppʦ~ʨjwaɣun,nanu jas~ɕa qu kinta nqu kaħal tekjopan waɣi qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia qani ɣa wiwal nqu s~ɕinqunan ru rŋu na liŋaj ʦ~ʨjukok ma.makia s~ɕqu s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ,ana makai inu ɣa βaqun mita kwara qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj nqu tteluw njux mtjuwaw nqu s~ɕs~ɕepljan. jalaw ɣi qpziŋ nqu βiw na ***ki zjuwaw na kinraral qani ɣa njux ms~ɕtijan mzzjuwaw,ru kokka na**qani ɣa njux ini ps~ɕβlaq minpira naħa ms~ɕʦ~ʨikuj mtʦ~ʨiriq.mrħuw nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia **minms~ɕβlaq ini ptalax ki qs~ɕu mrħuw na kokka na *,minnaki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ teħok s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ ɣa ʔnaɣan naħa mwaħ rmwaw zjuwaw s~ɕpjaŋ ppqutan nqu ɣɣalan ppila. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Cambodia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 105 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 181,035 sq km (maki' tay 90ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 176,515 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 4,520 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 15,957,223. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 32.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 56.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 11.40% Cambodia柬埔寨 zik nqu ziray 東漢 lga rima maki qu Cambodia bnrwan naha biru maki s Cyokok ."後漢書"sun nanah maha究不事,"隋書"sun naha ma真臘,"唐書"sun naha ma吉蔑,閣蔑(wiway Khmer pin tnaq nqu hngyang),maki squ 元朝sun naha maha甘勃智,"明史"sun naha ma武者,babaw nqu 明朝萬曆,s'agal naha squ hngiyang maha "kwara smllwan naha qani ga 皆為Kambuja qu pintnaq hngyang. anan ga maki te kyopan wagi bnrwan naha squ sraral ga , maki squ kawas te 1524 qsu ba lay lalu nqu Cambodia min htuw sa bnrwan na biru kahul squ 義大利安東尼奧·皮加費塔 lalu "Camogia"naqni qu pinlawa naha squ lalu na Kokka qani. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Phnom Penh. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Norodom Sihamoni, aring ryax 14 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zyuwa na sraral maki squ kung yal 1 Sici, zik nqu Camogia nyux ki'anKokka 扶南,smnhi squ 印度qani qu nyux naha galan smnhyan na kokka,nyux zzik qu sinqbangan gaga na 印度.Kokka nqu 扶南wiway yaqu qalang 毗耶陀補羅(Vyadhapura,梵文:燒批qalang nqu pqalup),misuw soni naga bih nqu qalang波羅勉, maki qu llyung nqu湄公te kyopan wagi mkura tltun mqluwi zik na bsilung squ ht'gan wagi.maki squ ziray na秦,漢, 扶南ki Cyokok ga maki qu pinkyalan naha nanak zyuwaw nqu tbziran. Kung ywan七Seci中葉,Kokka扶南hya ga wayal qolan ni mkura tltu 真臘,laqi nqu 扶南qani ga musa mtkari squ 爪哇,psrux squ山帝王朝. babaw na nwaha qmol nqu真臘Kokka na扶南lga,krahu ru lokah qu Kokkanya la；te huk闍耶跋摩klhangan nqu qutux na Seci,wal nya slqux rhyal kska ki mkura tltu Kokka寮,Kokka na國境mkura tltumubuy squ 南詔,rroq maki squ mkura kiluxv kyahu lliyung na湄公,ana yaqu misu nqu Kokka Cambodia qani uzi,Kokka寮ru mkura kilux 越南qani.Ungat qu kilbahan na闍耶跋摩qutux Seci,babaw nqu 卒lga laqiq na metswae nya kneril 闍耶提黛維qu syunaw cintman nya la,taqu Kokkaqani lgakmal maha wayal mkbka lma,sun naha maha史hyaga teqsya ru rrhyal qu真臘hya,nyux memaw mubu nanak. babaw nqu Kung yan787kawas,teqsya真臘qalang rhyal nqu wagi桑比補羅qani wahan kmyat ptyaqih na pequliq squ bslung na爪哇,mrhuw nqu Kokka na摩希婆提跋摩qani ga wayal kutan,laqiq nqu mrhuw (babaw nya lga闍耶跋摩te sazing Seci)wayal kyapun la.ubuy qsya nqu真臘aring kyalga爪哇m' 王朝nqu 夏連特拉la squnun mlahang kwara,muzing squ te sazing Seci nqu 闍耶跋摩kahul squ爪哇msbzinah mgay,m'thoki nanak.Taqu te sazing Seci nqu 闍耶跋摩wal nya sqtuxun squ qsya ki rrhyan nqu真臘,maki squ spzyang qalang na Kokka' 吳哥ht'gan wagi mkura tltu kya wal squ30kung ri ryax nqu荔枝,nyux psrux squ 吳哥王朝. 吳哥王朝,mutux naha smllwan maha Kokka高棉,mucing squ 12 Seci krahu naqu qpzing ,m'smyax qu gaga naha,hitgan nqu zka ru ana yaqu gin soni nqu kwara rhyan Cambodia ki 泰,寮,越rhyal nqu cyugan Kokka qani.13Seci,上座部佛教ga yaqu 斯里蘭卡qu mwah smatu.明宣德五kawas(1430kawas)kywpan nqu 暹羅qu Cambodia,qbyangun naha qalang 吳哥七byacing,pucing nya lga wayal naha kyopan qu吳哥.yalaw gi 吳哥ki 暹羅ga mksobih balay,nanu ya sa qu wal naha si laxi qu 吳哥,mshriq squ qalang te bih na king. babaw nya lga ,mhhwi ru walya slaqux qu Kokka na Cambodia,nyux mnaga Kokka na越南,qqolan naqu sazing Kokka na暹羅 ,maki squ zyuwaw na kinraral ga sun naha ma ziray nqu mnkun na Cambodia.te kyahu nqu Cambodia (maki squ lliyng湄公三角洲)mnaki squ ziray qani ga minqolan nqu越南,'mubuy squ bsyaq nqu kawas pinsqihan naha squ Kokka柬ki越. rhyal rhyan nyux ki'an na Cambodia ga maki squ kska na rhyal mkura kilux tekyopan wagi mkura kilux,kwara rhyan nya qani ga181,035ping bang kong ri, rhyal nqu pqmahan hya ga 20%,maki squ Kwara ka Kokka nqu te mkura kilux tehok tekyopan wagi qu rhyan ki'an naha,te mkura tltu hya ga rgyax nqu 扁擔 ki qes nqu 泰國柯叻,te rhyan nqu ht'gan wagi hya ga rhyan na臘塔納基里台ki Chhlong wagi rhyan ru 越南中央wagi rhyan ga mksopih.mkra tekyopan wagi hya ga rgzil ru b'nux kitan bsilung:mkkita squ暹邏wan bsilung na施亞努.ryax nq 扁擔makia squ rhyan nqu te mkura tltu,yaqu Kokka na泰rhyan na柯叻te mkura kilux myunaw ru mrsnat kwara,qani ga qes na Kokka泰ki Kokka na Cambodia. Pspngun qu lingay na Kokka ga,ini pyang karahu qu Kokka na Cambodia hya,kwara qu Kokka qani ga nyux qsugun squ 24 qalang(zik qani ga spayat qu mksobih sa bslung),atu cyugal hya ga 另klhangan naha nanak qu qalang naha,maki172 qu qalang,1547 rhyal.kil qruyux nqu kitan na bsilung Kokka hya ga 435 kung ri ,maki na qu ini ggwahi nqu rhyanl紅樹林. Spyang 'llwawktan nau kktan rhyal na Kokka Cambodia ga,cyux maki te ksak nqu rhyal Kokka lanuw洞里薩,llyung 巴薩kiwayal myut kwara squ Kokka mkura kilux mkura tltu nqu llyung 湄公.Kska nqu be'nux rhyal Kokka rhyal ga 3/4 kwara,ru ht'gan wagi mkura kilux ki te kyopan wagi nqu 象山,荳蔻山；musa te Kokka na泰國柯叻台rhyal rgyax qes na扁擔山；ru rhyal nqu ht'gan wagi越南 kska nqu wagi qes nqu cyux ki'an na Chhlong pspngun qu kilwagiq nyaga wa yaqu k'twan nqu qqhoniq,cikuy balay qu squliq nyux naha ki'an qani. 洞里薩湖─湄公 nyux ki'an rhyal qani ga rroq kinwagiq nya ga 100 kung c' nqu b'nux,maha mkrayas lga,mutux ini pyunaw qu rhyal nya la.tekyopan wagi mkura kilux rgyax nqu荳蔻 kinwagiq nya ga wal hminas squ 1500 kung c'taqu kinwagiq na tekyopan wagi mkura kilux,pwah squ tekyopan wagi mkura tltu tehuk squ ht'gan wagi mkura kilux.rgyax nqu奧拉爾山(Phnom Aural)hya ga spyang kinwagiq rgyx Kokka na Cambodia,cyux maki sa rhyal na ht'gan wagi,kinwagiq nya ga 1771kung c'. minkahul squ rgyax na荳蔻nqu rgyax象,mkura squ mkura kilux ru ht'gan wagi temkura killux,kinwagiq nya ga waya squ l500~1000 kung c'.sazing rhyal qani ga wiway mt 500~700 kung c'.yuwaw nqu rhyal na mkura tltu rgyax nqu 荳蔻ki rhyal nqu tekyopan wagi rgyax nqu 扁擔qani ga,llyung hgcyan na洞里薩,kglabang nya te huk squ Kokka be'nux na 泰,ga ggwahan tuqiy na曼谷. taqu spyang qryux na llyung Kokka na Cambodia湄公 ga,nyux nya saras squ cingyay na qsya qu Kokka qani.llyung na湄公kahul squ Cyokokk qu puqing nya,ru mqluwi緬甸,寮國,babaw nqu Kokka na 泰國,lga mwah myup squ Kokka na Cambodia.maki squ bih na king,rhyal nqu mkura kilux llyung Bassak,ru tehuk uzi squ tekyopan wagi mkura tltu mubuy squ langu na 洞里薩,si usa mekura squ rhyan na ht'gan wagi mkura kilux,aring squ 越南musa myup squ ksak na mkura kilux nqu bslung na Cyukok. Pinsrngyan na Kokka Spyang krahu rnaw Cyukok squ Kokka na Cambodia hya,ru msqun gmluw kbalay squ ssyan gwahan na qasu nqu 施亞努.Mrhuw nqu Cambodia 洪森mkura squ tetanux nqu mmosa naha ppcywagun,nanu yasa qu kinta nqu kahal tekyopan wagi qu Cambodia qani ga wiwal nqu sinqunan ru rngu na lingay Cyukok ma.makia squ spzyang qalang na Kokka',ana makai inu ga baqun mita kwara qu cingay nqu Tteluw nyux mtyuwaw nqu sseplyan. yalaw gi qpzing nqu Biw na 柏威夏ki zyuwaw na kinraral qani ga nyux mstiyan mzzyuwaw,ru Kokka na泰國qani ga nyux ini psblaq minpira naha mscikuy mtciriq.mrhuw nqu Cambodia 洪森minmsblaq ini ptalax ki qsu mrhuw na Kokka na 泰,minnaki squ 2009 kawas tehok squ 2010 kawas ga 'nagan naha mwah rmwaw zyuwaw spyang ppqutan nqu ggalan ppila. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% ʦ~ʨamβo*ia*** zik nqu ziraj ** lɣa rima maki qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia βnrwan naħa βiru maki s~ɕ ʦ~ʨjokok ."***"s~ɕun nanaħ maħa***,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,**(wiwaj kħmer pin tnaq nqu ħŋjaŋ),maki s~ɕqu **s~ɕun naħa maħa***,"**"s~ɕun naħa ma**,βaβaw nqu ****,s~ɕʔaɣal naħa s~ɕqu ħŋijaŋ maħa "kwara s~ɕmllwan naħa qani ɣa **kamβuja qu pintnaq ħŋjaŋ. anan ɣa maki te kjopan waɣi βnrwan naħa s~ɕqu s~ɕraral ɣa , maki s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ te **** qs~ɕu βa laj lalu nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia min ħtuw s~ɕa βnrwan na βiru kaħul s~ɕqu ************ lalu "ʦ~ʨamoɣia"naqni qu pinlawa naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kokka qani. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pħnom penħ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa noro*om s~ɕiħamoni, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. zjuwa na s~ɕraral maki s~ɕqu kuŋ jal * s~ɕiʦ~ʨi, zik nqu ʦ~ʨamoɣia njux kiʔankokka **,s~ɕmnħi s~ɕqu **qani qu njux naħa ɣalan s~ɕmnħjan na kokka,njux zzik qu s~ɕinqβaŋan ɣaɣa na **.kokka nqu **wiwaj jaqu qalaŋ *****(*ja*ħapura,**:**qalaŋ nqu pqalup),mis~ɕuw s~ɕoni naɣa βiħ nqu qalaŋ***, maki qu lljuŋ nqu**te kjopan waɣi mkura tltun mqluwi zik na βs~ɕiluŋ s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi.maki s~ɕqu ziraj na*,*, **ki ʦ~ʨjokok ɣa maki qu pinkjalan naħa nanak zjuwaw nqu tβziran. kuŋ jwan*s~ɕeʦ~ʨi**,kokka**ħja ɣa wajal qolan ni mkura tltu **,laqi nqu **qani ɣa mus~ɕa mtkari s~ɕqu **,ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu****. βaβaw na nwaħa qmol nqu**kokka na**lɣa,kraħu ru lokaħ qu kokkanja la*te ħuk****klħaŋan nqu qutux na s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,wal nja s~ɕlqux rħjal ks~ɕka ki mkura tltu kokka*,kokka na**mkura tltumuβuj s~ɕqu **,rroq maki s~ɕqu mkura kilux* kjaħu llijuŋ na**,ana jaqu mis~ɕu nqu kokka ʦ~ʨamβo*ia qani uzi,kokka*ru mkura kilux **qani.uŋat qu kilβaħan na****qutux s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,βaβaw nqu *lɣa laqiq na mets~ɕwae nja kneril *****qu s~ɕjunaw ʦ~ʨintman nja la,taqu kokkaqani lɣakmal maħa wajal mkβka lma,s~ɕun naħa maħa*ħjaɣa teqs~ɕja ru rrħjal qu**ħja,njux memaw muβu nanak. βaβaw nqu kuŋ jan***kawas~ɕ,teqs~ɕja**qalaŋ rħjal nqu waɣi****qani waħan kmjat ptjaqiħ na pequliq s~ɕqu βs~ɕluŋ na**,mrħuw nqu kokka na******qani ɣa wajal kutan,laqiq nqu mrħuw (βaβaw nja lɣa****te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi)wajal kjapun la.uβuj qs~ɕja nqu**ariŋ kjalɣa**mʔ **nqu ****la s~ɕqunun mlaħaŋ kwara,muziŋ s~ɕqu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi nqu ****kaħul s~ɕqu**ms~ɕβzinaħ mɣaj,mʔtħoki nanak.taqu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeʦ~ʨi nqu ****wal nja s~ɕqtuxun s~ɕqu qs~ɕja ki rrħjan nqu**,maki s~ɕqu s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ **ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura tltu kja wal s~ɕqu**kuŋ ri rjax nqu**,njux ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu ****. ****,mutux naħa s~ɕmllwan maħa kokka**,muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕqu ** s~ɕeʦ~ʨi kraħu naqu qpziŋ ,mʔs~ɕmjax qu ɣaɣa naħa,ħitɣan nqu zka ru ana jaqu ɣin s~ɕoni nqu kwara rħjan ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ki *,*,*rħjal nqu ʦ~ʨjuɣan kokka qani.**s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,*****ɣa jaqu ****qu mwaħ s~ɕmatu.****kawas~ɕ(****kawas~ɕ)kjwpan nqu **qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,qβjaŋun naħa qalaŋ ***βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,puʦ~ʨiŋ nja lɣa wajal naħa kjopan qu**.jalaw ɣi **ki **ɣa mks~ɕoβiħ βalaj,nanu ja s~ɕa qu wal naħa s~ɕi laxi qu **,ms~ɕħriq s~ɕqu qalaŋ te βiħ na kiŋ. βaβaw nja lɣa ,mħħwi ru walja s~ɕlaqux qu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,njux mnaɣa kokka na**,qqolan naqu s~ɕaziŋ kokka na** ,maki s~ɕqu zjuwaw na kinraral ɣa s~ɕun naħa ma ziraj nqu mnkun na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia.te kjaħu nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia (maki s~ɕqu llijŋ*****)mnaki s~ɕqu ziraj qani ɣa minqolan nqu**,ʔmuβuj s~ɕqu βs~ɕjaq nqu kawas~ɕ pins~ɕqiħan naħa s~ɕqu kokka*ki*. rħjal rħjan njux kiʔan na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ɣa maki s~ɕqu ks~ɕka na rħjal mkura kilux tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux,kwara rħjan nja qani ɣa***,***piŋ βaŋ koŋ ri, rħjal nqu pqmaħan ħja ɣa **%,maki s~ɕqu kwara ka kokka nqu te mkura kilux teħok tekjopan waɣi qu rħjan kiʔan naħa,te mkura tltu ħja ɣa rɣjax nqu ** ki qes~ɕ nqu ****,te rħjan nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi ħja ɣa rħjan na******ki ʦ~ʨħħloŋ waɣi rħjan ru ****waɣi rħjan ɣa mks~ɕopiħ.mkra tekjopan waɣi ħja ɣa rɣzil ru βʔnux kitan βs~ɕiluŋ:mkkita s~ɕqu**wan βs~ɕiluŋ na***.rjax nq **makia s~ɕqu rħjan nqu te mkura tltu,jaqu kokka na*rħjan na**te mkura kilux mjunaw ru mrs~ɕnat kwara,qani ɣa qes~ɕ na kokka*ki kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia. ps~ɕpŋun qu liŋaj na kokka ɣa,ini pjaŋ karaħu qu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħja,kwara qu kokka qani ɣa njux qs~ɕuɣun s~ɕqu ** qalaŋ(zik qani ɣa s~ɕpajat qu mks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕa βs~ɕluŋ),atu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħja ɣa *klħaŋan naħa nanak qu qalaŋ naħa,maki*** qu qalaŋ,**** rħjal.kil qrujux nqu kitan na βs~ɕiluŋ kokka ħja ɣa *** kuŋ ri ,maki na qu ini ɣɣwaħi nqu rħjanl***. s~ɕpjaŋ ʔllwawktan nau kktan rħjal na kokka ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux maki te ks~ɕak nqu rħjal kokka lanuw***,lljuŋ **kiwajal mjut kwara s~ɕqu kokka mkura kilux mkura tltu nqu lljuŋ **.ks~ɕka nqu βeʔnux rħjal kokka rħjal ɣa */* kwara,ru ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux ki te kjopan waɣi nqu **,****mus~ɕa te kokka na*****rħjal rɣjax qes~ɕ na****ru rħjal nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi** ks~ɕka nqu waɣi qes~ɕ nqu ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan na ʦ~ʨħħloŋ ps~ɕpŋun qu kilwaɣiq njaɣa wa jaqu kʔtwan nqu qqħoniq,ʦ~ʨikuj βalaj qu s~ɕquliq njux naħa kiʔan qani. ******* njux kiʔan rħjal qani ɣa rroq kinwaɣiq nja ɣa *** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ nqu βʔnux,maħa mkrajas~ɕ lɣa,mutux ini pjunaw qu rħjal nja la.tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux rɣjax nqu** kinwaɣiq nja ɣa wal ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu **** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔtaqu kinwaɣiq na tekjopan waɣi mkura kilux,pwaħ s~ɕqu tekjopan waɣi mkura tltu teħuk s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux.rɣjax nqu****(pħnom aural)ħja ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kinwaɣiq rɣjx kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia,ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa rħjal na ħtʔɣan waɣi,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa ****kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ. minkaħul s~ɕqu rɣjax na**nqu rɣjax*,mkura s~ɕqu mkura kilux ru ħtʔɣan waɣi temkura killux,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa waja s~ɕqu l***~**** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ.s~ɕaziŋ rħjal qani ɣa wiwaj mt ***~*** kuŋ ʦ~ʨʔ.juwaw nqu rħjal na mkura tltu rɣjax nqu **ki rħjal nqu tekjopan waɣi rɣjax nqu **qani ɣa,lljuŋ ħɣʦ~ʨjan na***,kɣlaβaŋ nja te ħuk s~ɕqu kokka βeʔnux na *,ɣa ɣɣwaħan tuqij na**. taqu s~ɕpjaŋ qrjux na lljuŋ kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia** ɣa,njux nja s~ɕaras~ɕ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨiŋjaj na qs~ɕja qu kokka qani.lljuŋ na**kaħul s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨjokokk qu puqiŋ nja,ru mqluwi**,**,βaβaw nqu kokka na **,lɣa mwaħ mjup s~ɕqu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia.maki s~ɕqu βiħ na kiŋ,rħjal nqu mkura kilux lljuŋ βas~ɕs~ɕak,ru teħuk uzi s~ɕqu tekjopan waɣi mkura tltu muβuj s~ɕqu laŋu na ***,s~ɕi us~ɕa mekura s~ɕqu rħjan na ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux,ariŋ s~ɕqu **mus~ɕa mjup s~ɕqu ks~ɕak na mkura kilux nqu βs~ɕluŋ na ʦ~ʨjukok. pins~ɕrŋjan na kokka s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu rnaw ʦ~ʨjukok s~ɕqu kokka na ʦ~ʨamβo*ia ħja,ru ms~ɕqun ɣmluw kβalaj s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕjan ɣwaħan na qas~ɕu nqu ***.mrħuw nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia **mkura s~ɕqu tetanux nqu mmos~ɕa naħa ppʦ~ʨjwaɣun,nanu jas~ɕa qu kinta nqu kaħal tekjopan waɣi qu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia qani ɣa wiwal nqu s~ɕinqunan ru rŋu na liŋaj ʦ~ʨjukok ma.makia s~ɕqu s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ,ana makai inu ɣa βaqun mita kwara qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj nqu tteluw njux mtjuwaw nqu s~ɕs~ɕepljan. jalaw ɣi qpziŋ nqu βiw na ***ki zjuwaw na kinraral qani ɣa njux ms~ɕtijan mzzjuwaw,ru kokka na**qani ɣa njux ini ps~ɕβlaq minpira naħa ms~ɕʦ~ʨikuj mtʦ~ʨiriq.mrħuw nqu ʦ~ʨamβo*ia **minms~ɕβlaq ini ptalax ki qs~ɕu mrħuw na kokka na *,minnaki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ teħok s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ ɣa ʔnaɣan naħa mwaħ rmwaw zjuwaw s~ɕpjaŋ ppqutan nqu ɣɣalan ppila. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
